name: Notes
description: A short freeform list edited from a QR-backed admin editor (POST /api/widgets/[id]/config). Per-instance lines live in `widget.config_json.lines` (write-back path); `settings:notes` is a legacy single-store fallback for installs predating the widget-config write path. Renders up to 4 / 8 / 16 lines on 1x2 / 2x2 / 4x4 respectively and stamps a tiny scan-to-edit QR in the bottom-right corner.
